sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15095" key="a)risteutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀριστ-ευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n15095.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of, belonging to valiant deeds,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:29:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.319b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
